mapper.insert: INSERT INTO settlement ( trade_seq, member_seller_seq, sale_price, delivery_cost, commission_rate, commission, settlement_amount, settlement_st, request_dtm, crt_dtm ) VALUES ( #{trade_seq}, #{member_seller_seq}, #{sale_price}, #{delivery_cost}, #{commission_rate}, #{commission}, #{settlement_amount}, 'REQUESTED', now(), now() )
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, t.sale_title FROM settlement s JOIN sb_trade_info t ON s.trade_seq = t.trade_seq WHERE s.settlement_seq = #{settlement_seq}

SELECT s.*, t.sale_title, seller.member_nicknm AS member_seller_nm FROM settlement s JOIN sb_trade_info t ON s.trade_seq = t.trade_seq LEFT JOIN member_info seller ON s.member_seller_seq = seller.member_seq WHERE s.trade_seq = #{trade_seq}

SELECT s.*, t.sale_title, seller.member_nicknm AS member_seller_nm FROM settlement s JOIN sb_trade_info t ON s.trade_seq = t.trade_seq LEFT JOIN member_info seller ON s.member_seller_seq = seller.member_seq WHERE s.settlement_st = #{settlement_st} ORDER BY s.request_dtm DESC

SELECT s.*, mba.bank_code, mba.bank_account_no, mba.account_holder_nm FROM settlement s LEFT JOIN member_bank_account mba ON s.member_seller_seq = mba.member_seq WHERE s.settlement_st = 'REQUESTED' ORDER BY s.request_dtm ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE settlement SET settlement_st = 'COMPLETED', settled_dtm = now(), upd_dtm = now() WHERE settlement_seq = #{settlement_seq} AND settlement_st = 'REQUESTED'
UPDATE settlement SET settlement_st = 'INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE', upd_dtm = now() WHERE settlement_seq = #{settlement_seq} AND settlement_st = 'REQUESTED'
UPDATE sb_trade_info SET settlement_st = #{settlement_st}, upd_dtm = now() WHERE trade_seq = #{trade_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT balance FROM admin_account WHERE account_seq = #{account_seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_account SET balance = balance - #{amount}, upd_dtm = now() WHERE account_seq = #{account_seq}
UPDATE admin_account SET balance = balance + #{amount}, upd_dtm = now() WHERE account_seq = #{account_seq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_account_log (account_seq, settlement_seq, amount, balance_after, description, crt_dtm) VALUES (#{account_seq}, #{settlement_seq}, #{amount}, #{balance_after}, #{description}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, t.sale_title, m.member_nicknm AS member_seller_nm, mba.bank_code, mba.bank_account_no, mba.account_holder_nm FROM settlement s JOIN sb_trade_info t ON s.trade_seq = t.trade_seq JOIN member_info m ON s.member_seller_seq = m.member_seq LEFT JOIN member_bank_account mba ON s.member_seller_seq = mba.member_seq WHERE s.settlement_st = 'COMPLETED' AND s.transfer_confirmed_yn = 0 ORDER BY s.settled_dtm DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(settlement_amount), 0) FROM settlement WHERE settlement_st = 'COMPLETED' AND transfer_confirmed_yn = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE settlement SET transfer_confirmed_yn = 1, upd_dtm = now() WHERE settlement_seq = #{settlement_seq} AND settlement_st = 'COMPLETED' AND transfer_confirmed_yn = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM settlement WHERE settlement_st = #{settlement_st}
mapper.update: UPDATE settlement SET settlement_st = 'REQUESTED', upd_dtm = now() WHERE settlement_seq = #{settlement_seq} AND settlement_st = 'INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE'
